title: get apihealth returns service and database status
description: Verify that GET /api/health returns HTTP 200 with correct service and database status when backend and database are healthy.

title: get apistadiums returns list of stadiums
description: Verify that GET /api/stadiums returns HTTP 200 with an array of available stadium records.

title: get apivenuestadiumname returns venue metadata or 404
description: Verify that GET /api/venue/{stadium_name} returns HTTP 200 with venue metadata for a valid stadium name and HTTP 404 for an unknown stadium name.

title: get apicrowdstadiumname returns live gate wait times or 404
description: Verify that GET /api/crowd/{stadium_name} returns HTTP 200 with current gate wait times for a valid stadium and HTTP 404 for an unknown stadium.

title: post apicrowdupdate updates crowd wait times or errors
description: Verify that POST /api/crowd/update with valid stadium_name, gate_name, and waiting_time returns HTTP 200 confirming update; invalid or missing waiting_time returns HTTP 500; unknown stadium returns HTTP 404.

title: post apifeedback records user feedback or returns errors
description: Verify that POST /api/feedback with valid payload returns HTTP 200 confirming feedback recorded; malformed payload or invalid scores returns HTTP 422; persistence failure returns HTTP 500.

title: post apiitinerary generates optimized itinerary or errors
description: Verify that POST /api/itinerary with valid prompt, stadium, crowd_tolerance, and dietary_preferences returns HTTP 200 with optimized itinerary; incomplete or invalid input or Gemini rate-limit/failure returns HTTP 500.

title: post authsignup registers user or returns error
description: Verify that POST /auth/signup with valid user data including dietary_preferences array returns HTTP 200 confirming account creation; duplicate or invalid payload returns HTTP 400.

title: post authlogin authenticates user or returns unauthorized
description: Verify that POST /auth/login with valid credentials returns HTTP 200 with JWT token; invalid username or password returns HTTP 401.

title: get authprofile retrieves or denies access to user profile
description: Verify that GET /auth/profile with valid JWT token returns HTTP 200 with protected profile details; without or with invalid/expired token returns HTTP 401; non-existent user returns HTTP 404.
